notes: v0.16.31 — 3 LIVES per rift; defeat costs one life and leaves you on the same node to retry, lives run out = rift fails. All difficulties now have exactly 6 stops + boss (was 3/5/7/10) — difficulty only changes boss tier and rewards now. HEAL nodes restore +1 life (cap 3; +25 PULSE consolation if already maxed). Visible heart pips on the run map header AND in a new top-left RIFT chip in the in-match HUD with difficulty + stop X/Y. Phase 4: MINI-BOSS node launches a real boss-rush encounter using the rift's boss at rift difficulty, no minion spawn (solo duel), boss key cost bypassed (energy paid the entry). Windows only.
